name: Greendale Farm Shop & Café
description: Family farm shop with animals, play area and excellent café. Meet the goats, chickens and donkeys then refuel with cream teas.

name: RAMM Museum
description: Royal Albert Memorial Museum with interactive family galleries, world cultures collection and regular family workshops.

name: Castle Park Adventure Playground
description: Exciting outdoor play area with climbing frames, zip wire, swings and slides set in beautiful park grounds.

name: Escot Park & Gardens
description: Wildwood adventure park with otters, wild boar, red squirrels, maze and nature trails through ancient woodland.

name: Puffin Park Soft Play
description: Indoor soft play centre with separate toddler zone, climbing frames, slides and ball pit. Great for rainy days.

name: The Donkey Sanctuary
description: Award-winning sanctuary home to hundreds of rescued donkeys and mules. Free entry with lovely walks and café.

name: Exe Estuary Trail: Topsham to Lympstone
description: Scenic flat riverside path following the Exe Estuary with stunning bird-watching opportunities.

name: Woodbury Castle Heathland Walk
description: Iron Age hill fort with panoramic views across East Devon. Heathland walk through gorse and heather.

name: Hurn Valley Nature Trail
description: Beautiful family-friendly walk through ancient woodland following the river Hurn. Bluebells in spring.

name: Exmouth Beach & Seafront Trail
description: Sandy beach walk along Exmouth seafront from the dunes to Orcombe Point with rock pools and sand play.

name: Lympstone Exe Estuary Walk
description: Gentle circular walk from Lympstone village along the estuary edge with views to Powderham Castle.
